## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for new behaviour

- [ ] No new lint errors (`biome check` / `ruff check` passes locally)
- [ ] Error messages include business context, not generic strings
- [ ] Dead code removed (nothing commented out)
- [ ] Screenshot or recording attached (if UI change)
